meaning: n.绞车手,卷扬机操纵工 (船舶起货机的)开关手
examples: Foreman: (To winchman) Lift the empty barrels back.
The tallymen's stand-by was not due to the unskilled handling of the winchman but to the breakdown of the winch.
Bond winchman Andrew Cowx and winch operator Paul Walters have received an award.
During the rescue, the winchman remained on the deck of the stricken vessel until the remaining crewmen had been airlifted.
In the airlift operation, the helicopter's winchman was plunged into the sea several times as the aircraft's crew struggled to deal with the conditions.
